name: @aigon/cli
description: CLI for the Aigon Spec-Driven AI Dev Flow
author: Sen Labs (https://senlabs.ai)

scripts.postinstall: node ./aigon-cli.js global-setup --non-interactive --quiet || true && node scripts/fix-node-pty-perms.js || true
scripts.test: npm run lint && node scripts/generate-workflow-diagrams.js --check && node tests/integration/lifecycle.test.js && node tests/integration/bootstrap-engine-state.test.js && node tests/integration/agent-prompt-resolver.test.js && node tests/integration/agent-registry-contract.test.js && node tests/integration/spec-review-status.test.js && node tests/integration/agent-log-collector.test.js && node tests/integration/submit-signal-loss.test.js && node tests/integration/static-guards.test.js && node tests/integration/feature-dependencies.test.js && node tests/integration/feature-sets.test.js && node tests/integration/set-conductor.test.js && node tests/integration/feature-close-restart.test.js && node tests/integration/remote-gate-github.test.js && node tests/integration/stats-aggregate.test.js && node tests/integration/feature-close-scan-target.test.js && node tests/integration/misc-command-wrapper.test.js && node tests/integration/auto-session-state.test.js && node tests/integration/workflow-read-model.test.js && node tests/integration/dashboard-review-statuses.test.js && node tests/integration/worktree-state-reconcile.test.js && node tests/integration/session-sidecar.test.js && node tests/integration/awaiting-input.test.js && node tests/integration/awaiting-input-dashboard.test.js && node tests/integration/supervisor-idle-and-preauth.test.js && node tests/integration/spec-reconcile-endpoint.test.js && node tests/integration/spec-recommendation.test.js && node tests/integration/pty-terminal.test.js && node tests/integration/action-scope.test.js && node tests/integration/command-registry-drift.test.js && node tests/integration/rebase-needed.test.js && node tests/integration/agent-session-id-capture.test.js && node tests/integration/feature-do-resume.test.js && node tests/integration/global-config-migration.test.js && node tests/integration/agent-failover.test.js && node tests/integration/hook-binary-resolution.test.js && node tests/integration/migration-255.test.js && node tests/integration/feature-close-failure-event.test.js && node tests/integration/sync-state.test.js && node tests/integration/getNextId-worktree-aware.test.js
